title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Completed and independently reviewed Approved Runtime Track 1 Task 5. Implemented four readiness verdicts, explicit fail-closed finding classification, strict config/privacy/path/lock/handoff/current-integrity gates, typed invocation-scoped development override, readiness CLI, provenance-bearing mutation summaries, and pre-lock/pre-write guards across all public mutations. Fixed review findings covering playbook recovery, identity alias classification, host/provider privacy semantics, repeated session phase-1 idempotency, editable-only workflow overrides, pin-match reporting, privacy exit consistency, and unknown-provider diagnostics. Full suite passes 348 tests; final independent verdict is commit-ready; plan Task 5 checklist is marked complete. Changes remain uncommitted.
blockers: No corpus adoption or mutation is authorized; a deterministic fingerprinted adoption plan requires later owner approval.
open_questions: Decide when to begin the separately planned Semantic Integrity Guardrails work after the Approved Runtime track.
next_actions: Commit Track 1 Task 5 when authorized, then begin Task 6 runtime binding across session handoffs.
continuation_hint: Next: Commit Track 1 Task 5 when authorized, then begin Task 6 runtime binding across session handoffs.
